sentences.text: Poirot este bolnav. Are gripă.
sentences.original: Poirot in his turn had gone down.

sentences.text: Stă în pat, iar eu, Hastings, sunt cu el.
sentences.translationRu: Он лежит в постели, а я, Гастингс, рядом с ним.
sentences.original: He was now sitting up in bed.

sentences.text: Un domn vine la noi.
sentences.original: There's a gentleman downstairs.

sentences.text: Se numește Roger Havering și pare speriat.
sentences.translationRu: Его зовут Роджер Хейверинг, и он кажется напуганным.
sentences.original: Mr. Roger Havering. he was evidently labouring under great agitation.

sentences.text: Unchiul meu a fost ucis azi-noapte, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: Моего дядю убили прошлой ночью, говорит он.
sentences.original: My uncle was foully murdered last night.

sentences.text: S-a întâmplat în Derbyshire.
sentences.original: No, in Derbyshire.

sentences.text: Soția mea mi-a trimis o telegramă.
sentences.original: I received a telegram from my wife this morning.

sentences.text: Poirot nu poate merge, așa că merg eu.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро не может поехать, поэтому еду я.
sentences.original: Poirot is ill in bed. You want to go yourself, is it not so?

sentences.text: Îi voi scrie în fiecare zi.
sentences.translationRu: Я буду писать ему каждый день.
sentences.original: report to me fully every day.

sentences.text: Casa se numește Hunter's Lodge.
sentences.original: Hunter's Lodge, where we are going.

sentences.text: Este o casă de vânătoare, singură pe câmpie.
sentences.translationRu: Это охотничий домик, один среди пустоши.
sentences.original: is only a small shooting-box in the heart of the moors.

sentences.text: Unchiul, domnul Pace, era bogat.
sentences.original: my uncle was a rich one.

sentences.text: Ajungem la casă după-amiaza.
sentences.original: It was about three o'clock when we arrived.

sentences.text: Ce loc singuratic!, spun eu.
sentences.original: A lonely place, I observed with a shiver.

sentences.text: La ușă ne așteaptă Japp, de la poliție.
sentences.translationRu: У двери нас ждёт Джепп, из полиции.
sentences.original: Japp! The Scotland Yard inspector.

sentences.text: Eu intru în casă.
sentences.original: I went on to the house.

sentences.text: O femeie în negru deschide.
sentences.original: a middle-aged woman in black.

sentences.text: Este menajera, doamna Middleton.
sentences.original: Mrs. Middleton, the housekeeper.

sentences.text: Aseară a venit un om, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Вчера вечером пришёл человек, говорит она.
sentences.original: It was after dinner last night that the man came.

sentences.text: Voia să-l vadă pe domnul Pace.
sentences.original: He asked to see Mr. Pace.

sentences.text: Nu și-a spus numele, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Он не назвал своего имени, говорит она.
sentences.original: He wouldn't give any name.

sentences.text: L-am dus în camera cu arme.
sentences.translationRu: Я провела его в оружейную комнату.
sentences.original: I showed him into the gun-room.

sentences.text: Apoi am auzit voci tari.
sentences.original: I heard loud voices, as if they were quarrelling.

sentences.text: Deodată s-a auzit o împușcătură.
sentences.original: there was a shot.

sentences.text: Pe urmă o tăcere grea.
sentences.original: and then a dreadful silence.

sentences.text: Ușa era încuiată.
sentences.original: the gun-room door, but it was locked.

sentences.text: Am mers la fereastră.
sentences.original: we had to go round to the window.

sentences.text: Domnul Pace era mort.
sentences.original: there inside was Mr. Pace, all shot.

sentences.text: Omul a fugit pe fereastră.
sentences.original: He must have got away through the window.

sentences.text: Cum arăta acel om?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: Как выглядел тот человек?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: What was this man like?

sentences.text: Avea o barbă neagră și vorbea ca un american.
sentences.translationRu: У него была чёрная борода, и он говорил как американец.
sentences.original: He had a black beard, sir. he spoke like an American.

sentences.text: Acum vine doamna Havering.
sentences.original: a very handsome young woman coming towards me.

sentences.text: Este tânără și frumoasă.
sentences.original: a very handsome young woman.

sentences.text: Poartă un pulover roșu aprins.
sentences.original: She wore a flame-coloured jumper.

sentences.text: Eu nu am văzut omul, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Я не видела того человека, говорит она.
sentences.original: I'm afraid not. I didn't see him.

sentences.text: Unchiul a mers singur la el.
sentences.original: but went off at once.

sentences.text: Apoi am auzit împușcătura, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Потом я услышала выстрел, говорит она.
sentences.original: Then we heard the shot.

sentences.text: Pe perete erau două pistoale ale soțului meu.
sentences.translationRu: На стене было два пистолета моего мужа.
sentences.original: A pair of revolvers of my husband's were mounted upon the wall.

sentences.text: Un pistol lipsește acum.
sentences.original: One of them is missing.

sentences.text: Eu merg în camera cu arme.
sentences.original: May I go to the gun-room?

sentences.text: Văd doar o pată de sânge pe covor.
sentences.translationRu: Вижу только пятно крови на ковре.
sentences.original: a large bloodstain on the carpet.

sentences.text: La început m-am gândit la Havering, spune Japp.
sentences.translationRu: Сначала я думал на Хейверинга, говорит Джепп.
sentences.original: I'd got my eye on Havering to begin with.

sentences.text: El are multe datorii.
sentences.original: he's pretty heavily in debt now.

sentences.text: Banii unchiului ar fi ai lui.
sentences.original: the uncle's will would be in his favour.

sentences.text: Dar Havering a plecat la Londra cu trenul de seară.
sentences.translationRu: Но Хейверинг уехал в Лондон вечерним поездом.
sentences.original: there's no doubt whatever that he left by the 6.15.

sentences.text: Deci nu el l-a ucis.
sentences.original: he couldn't have been shooting his uncle here.

sentences.text: Eu îi scriu lui Poirot o scrisoare.
sentences.original: I sat down and wrote a lengthy account to Poirot.

sentences.text: La Ealing s-a găsit un pistol, din care s-a tras un foc.
sentences.translationRu: В Илинге нашли пистолет, из которого стреляли один раз.
sentences.original: it contained a revolver. One bullet had been fired from it.

sentences.text: Vine o telegramă de la Poirot.
sentences.original: A wire from Poirot arrived.

sentences.text: Omul cu barbă nu este Havering.
sentences.original: Of course black bearded man was not Havering.

sentences.text: Scrie-mi cum sunt îmbrăcate femeile.
sentences.original: wire me what clothes she wore.

sentences.text: A doua telegramă spune ceva ciudat.
sentences.original: At eleven a reply wire came from Poirot.

sentences.text: Arestați menajera repede!
sentences.original: Advise Japp arrest housekeeper before it is too late.

sentences.text: Dar este prea târziu.
sentences.original: But it was too late.

sentences.text: Doamna Middleton a dispărut.
sentences.original: Mrs. Middleton had vanished into thin air.

sentences.text: Cazul este de neînțeles!, spun eu lui Poirot.
sentences.original: the thing's a dark mystery!

sentences.text: Eu știu cine l-a ucis, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Я знаю, кто его убил, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: I know well enough who killed Mr. Harrington Pace.

sentences.text: Havering era la Londra, e adevărat.
sentences.translationRu: Хейверинг был в Лондоне, это правда.
sentences.original: Mr. Havering did not shoot his uncle.

sentences.text: Dar mai există o doamnă Havering.
sentences.original: But there is a Mrs. Havering, Hastings.

sentences.text: Imposibil!, spun eu. Menajera era cu ea.
sentences.translationRu: Невозможно!, говорю я. Экономка была с ней.
sentences.original: Impossible! The housekeeper was with her when the shot was fired.

sentences.text: Menajera nu există, spune Poirot.
sentences.original: no one will ever find her, because she does not exist!

sentences.text: Zoe a fost actriță.
sentences.original: Zoe Havering was an actress before her marriage.

sentences.text: Menajera și doamna Havering sunt aceeași femeie.
sentences.translationRu: Экономка и миссис Хейверинг — одна женщина.
sentences.original: neither you nor Japp ever saw Mrs. Middleton and her mistress at one and the same time.

sentences.text: În holul întunecat nimeni n-a văzut bine.
sentences.translationRu: В тёмной прихожей никто не разглядел.
sentences.original: you and Japp only saw the housekeeper in a dark hall.

sentences.text: Ea urca repede pe scări.
sentences.original: she runs upstairs.

sentences.text: Își punea un pulover roșu și o pălărie cu păr negru.
sentences.translationRu: Надевала красный свитер и шляпку с чёрными волосами.
sentences.original: slips on a bright jumper and a hat with black curls attached.

sentences.text: Și cobora ca doamna Havering.
sentences.original: the brilliant Zoe Havering comes down.

sentences.text: Dar pistolul de la Ealing?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: А пистолет в Илинге?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: But the revolver that was found at Ealing?

sentences.text: Acela a fost soțul, spune Poirot.
sentences.original: that was Roger Havering's job.

sentences.text: El a dus pistolul la Londra și l-a pus în gardul de la Ealing.
sentences.translationRu: Он отвёз пистолет в Лондон и положил его в ограду в Илинге.
sentences.original: brought it up to London. placed the parcel where it was found.

sentences.text: Voiau să mute poliția departe de casă.
sentences.translationRu: Они хотели увести полицию подальше от дома.
sentences.original: they were anxious to get the police away.

sentences.text: Soția l-a ucis pe unchi, pe la spate.
sentences.translationRu: Жена убила дядю, выстрелив в спину.
sentences.original: his wife quietly shoots Mr. Pace. he was shot from behind?

sentences.text: Este de necrezut, dar adevărat, spun eu.
sentences.translationRu: Это невероятно, но это правда, говорю я.
sentences.original: It's incredible, I murmured. And yet it is true.

sentences.text: Dar poliția nu îi poate pedepsi.
sentences.translationRu: Но полиция не может их наказать.
sentences.original: unable to get together the necessary evidence.

sentences.text: Banii unchiului au ajuns la ei.
sentences.original: Mr. Pace's huge fortune passed into the hands of his murderers.

sentences.text: Dar soarta i-a ajuns până la urmă.
sentences.translationRu: Но судьба их в конце концов настигла.
sentences.original: Nevertheless, Nemesis did overtake them.

sentences.text: Avionul lor spre Paris s-a prăbușit.
sentences.original: killed in the crashing of the Air Mail to Paris.

sentences.text: Cei doi soți au murit, și dreptatea a fost făcută.
sentences.translationRu: Оба супруга погибли, и правосудие свершилось.
sentences.original: I knew that Justice was satisfied.
